reviews.text: This place has amazing view on the library. I enjoyed sitting there outside and looking at brutal architectural masterpiece a lot. Pumpkins ravioli are the best!! You should try them. Lemonade with red fruits was also good.  This place can be improved, they need to add more vegetarian main dishes, then we can recommend it to friends and progressive places becomes more popular.

This place it's great if you like Gin.
They have a nice variety of different brands and mixes.
I don't if it was the day that we went or what but the service took a lot of time to bring us the food. Also, one of my friends ask for something and didn't get until the second or third time of asking.
The place it's so nice and it's Instagram wordy but if the service and the food does adds up, I don't if would go there again.
The positive things is that the saw we were celebrating a birthday and brought a mini cake to celebrate.

I went for lunch there after visiting the Library it was around 13hs.
The place was not full but they asked me to sit in a single table (is not a big issue but I wanted more shade, and 4 sit tables were more accommodating) I assumed it was because most where reserved.
I seated and waited 10 mins to get a menu, another 10 mins to order. My food was good but with little flavor.
I asked for the check and they bring it 10 mins later and went off. I had to wait 15 mins to spot again a waiter to ask to pay. I really don’t understand why would they leave you the check and leave? If I asked for the bill is because I want to pay and leave not see it for 15 mins and then pay. The restaurant was not full and had few clients. Why the service is so slow and unattentive is out of my comprehension.
lovely place but I think it’s a little too expensive so far, but perfect place to go even if you want to be alone

Invernadero was a really pleasant surprise for us. We were 3 and shared some tapas with dessert. We also had some gin and tonic which is the house strongest argument. The tapas were great, each with its distinctive flavor and decorations. The setting is also great and the music is chill with a volume that lets you chat with friends. The staff was super helpful too and the service was fast and clean. The prices are the usual for the area, and we did not feel they overcharge for what they offer.
